title: Make congress page and read endpoints public

log.context: Make congress page and read endpoints public

Done. Here's a summary of what changed:

**`/mnt/data/hello-world/serve.py`**
- Removed `_is_authed` checks (and the early-return 401 responses) from:
  - `GET /api/congress/stream`
  - `GET /api/congress/identities`
  - `GET /api/congress/sessions`
  - `GET /api/congress/sessions/<id>`
  - `GET /api/agents`
- Replaced the 302 redirect-to-login for `GET /congress` with a plain `pass` (falls through to static file serving as before)
- Auth remains on all write endpoints: `POST /api/congress`, `PO...(truncated)
